docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, ALAN
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-09-1994, CONTINUED TO FEB-07-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-07-1995, CONTINUED TO MAY-08-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-08-1995, CONTINUED TO JUN-20-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-20-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-20-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLAINTIFF TO SHOW CAUSE WHY PROOF OF SERVICE NOT FILED AND FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR ON 6/20/95. COURT TO DISMISS CASE IF NO APPEARANCE ON 7/20/95. HEARING SET FOR JUL-20-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, ALAN

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-20-1995, CONTINUED TO AUG-21-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 8/14/95; ANY QUESTION RE: ENTERING OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT SHOULD BE REFERRED TO JUDGE QUIDACHAY IN DEPT. 4. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF DAVID DINERMAN FILED RE: NONPAYMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, ALAN
CORRESPONDENCE FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, ALAN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED AS TO DEFT: LANSBURG, SCOTT UNABLE TO ENTER DEFAULT- NO SUMMONS OR POS THEREOF. JUDGMENT ENTERED PER DEPT 2 ON COURT DETERMINATION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLANSBURG, SCOTT $4,460.37 PRINCIPAL, $700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,203.02 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,467.39
SERVICE FEE CERTIFIED COPY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, ALAN
SERVICE FEE CERTIFIED COPY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, ALAN

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT FLANSBURG, SCOTT SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-09-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-11-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-21-1994
